content.text:
I'll start by running the warmup protocol as specified in the session protocol.

```bash
git fetch origin main && git merge origin/main --no-edit
```

```

Already up to date.
```

```bash
git log -3
```

```bash
ls tasks/*.md 2>/dev/null || echo "No task files found"
```

```
tasks/master-implementation-status.md
```

Good. The repository is up to date with the latest commits from today (December 9, 2024). The recent work involved Phase 5 sidebar restructuring with tab-based navigation and fixes to the TimeTracking functionality.

The only active task file is `tasks/master-implementation-status.md` which is the roadmap/status file.

I'm ready to assist. What would you like to work on today?
